mapper.sql: tei.send_to, tei.mail_subject, tei.planned_date, tei.send_date, tei.status, tei.attribute1, tei.attribute2, tei.attribute3, tei.attribute4, tei.attribute5, tei.server_id as tes_id, tei.mail_content, tei.error_message, tei.id, tei.update_by, tei.create_time, tei.create_by, tei.update_time

${tAlias}.send_to as ${tAlias}_send_to, ${tAlias}.mail_subject as ${tAlias}_mail_subject, ${tAlias}.planned_date as ${tAlias}_planned_date, ${tAlias}.send_date as ${tAlias}_send_date, ${tAlias}.status as ${tAlias}_status, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.server_id as ${tAlias}_tes_id, ${tAlias}.mail_content as ${tAlias}_mail_content, ${tAlias}.error_message as ${tAlias}_error_message, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time

select
,
from tool_email_interface tei left outer join tool_email_server tes on tei.server_id = tes.id
mapper.insert: insert into tool_email_interface (send_to, mail_subject, planned_date, send_date, status, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, server_id, mail_content, error_message, update_by, create_time, create_by, update_time) values (#{sendTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mailSubject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{plannedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sendDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emailServer.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{mailContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update tool_email_interface set send_to = #{sendTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mail_subject = #{mailSubject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, planned_date = #{plannedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, send_date = #{sendDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, server_id = #{emailServer.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, mail_content = #{mailContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_message = #{errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update tool_email_interface set send_to = #{sendTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mail_subject = #{mailSubject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, planned_date = #{plannedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, send_date = #{sendDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, server_id = #{emailServer.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, mail_content = #{mailContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_message = #{errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and status = #{oldStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
